title: Sainik School, Kapurthala
tagline: Sainik School, Kapurthala — heritage city of Punjab

overview.short: Sainik School Kapurthala is one of 33 Sainik Schools across India.
overview.description: Sainik School Kapurthala is one of 33 Sainik Schools across India. The school was inaugurated in July 1961 by the then Defence Minister V.K. Krishna Menon, with the objective of preparing boys and girls for entry into National Defence Academy in Khadakwasla. Its motto is "Knowledge, Humility and Discipline". It is a fully residential school for boys only, providing public school education.

topPlaces.name: Sidhwan Bet
topPlaces.description: Sidhwan Bet is a village in Jagraon Tehsil in Ludhiana district of Punjab State, India. It is located 13 kilometres (8.1 mi) from Jagraon, The village is administrated by a Sarpanch who is an elected representative of village as per the constitution of India and Panchayati raj (India).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sainik School, Kapurthala?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sainik School, Kapurthala is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sainik School, Kapurthala?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Sri Guru Ram Dass Jee International Airport, Amritsar (68 km) and the nearest railway station is Amritsar Junction (58 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sainik School, Kapurthala?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sainik School, Kapurthala at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sainik School, Kapurthala?
faq.a: Stays in Sainik School, Kapurthala start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sainik School, Kapurthala?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sidhwan Bet, Saprore, Paman, Sultanpur Lodhi, Chogawan, Bhulath, Kamalpur, Bhulath.
